This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The first [Arg3] {Screech, Blood!} cards played each turn do not add {Arithmetica Harmony}. Uvhash's Base DMG +[Arg4]%, and the effect doubles when HP is below 25%.
